response: ## Perspective Audit Summary **Component/artifact reviewed:** Dense Admin Settings Panel With Jargon **Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Cognitive Neurodivergent, Magnification Reflow, Screen Reader Semantic, Environmental Contrast **Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Keyboard Motor, Auditory Access, Vestibular Motion --- ### Findings by Severity | Severity | Count | |---|---| | CRITICAL | 2 | | MAJOR | 7 | | MINOR | 1 | | ENHANCEMENT | 0 | --- ### Perspectives That Passed None of the escalated perspectives passed all checklist items. --- ### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role #### **Front-End Dev** - **9px section headers fail magnification requirements** — Magnification Reflow — CRITICAL — 1.4.4 - **3-column layout breaks at 320px viewport** — Magnification Reflow — CRITICAL — 1.4.10 - **Error messages not associated with inputs** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 3.3.1 - **Required fields marked only by red asterisk** — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 3.3.2 - **No unsaved-changes indicator** — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 3.3.4 #### **Content Author** - **Technical jargon without tooltips/glossary links** — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 3.1.3 - **Error codes instead of human-readable messages** — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 3.3.3 - **No plain-language explanations for security terms** — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 3.1.4 #### **Visual Design** - **9px headers fail contrast and legibility** — Magnification Reflow — CRITICAL — 1.4.4 - **Red asterisk for required fields at 9px** — Environmental Contrast — MAJOR — 1.4.3 - **Error text at 11px may fail contrast** — Environmental Contrast — MINOR — 1.4.3 #### **UX Design** - **12 toggles with no visual sub-grouping** — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 3.2.4 - **No unsaved-changes banner/indicator** — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 3.3.4 --- ### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification - Error message "ERR_CSP_001" requires content author to verify if it's mapped to a documented explanation - "Structured access logging" and "stale-while-revalidate" require verification of glossary links - "Immutable audit trail (WAL)" requires verification of plain-language explanation --- ### Recommended Next Step **REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping) --- ## Detailed Findings ``` **Finding:** 9px section headers fail magnification requirements and cognitive legibility **WCAG:** 1.4.4 Resize Text, 1.4.10 Reflow **Perspective:** Magnification Reflow **Severity:** CRITICAL **Route to:** Visual Design (primary) (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** `.settings-column h2 { font-size: 9px }` **Fix:** Increase to 14px minimum for section headers and 12px for body text ``` ``` **Finding:** 3-column layout breaks at 320px viewport with horizontal scrolling **WCAG:** 1.4.10 Reflow **Perspective:** Magnification Reflow **Severity:** CRITICAL **Route to:** Visual Design (primary) (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** `.settings-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr }` **Fix:** Add `@media (max-width: 320px)` to switch to single-column layout ``` ``` **Finding:** Error messages use codes like "ERR_CSP_001" without human-readable descriptions **WCAG:** 3.3.3 Error Suggestion **Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Content Author (primary) (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** `{t.error && {t.error}}` **Fix:** Replace error codes with plain-language descriptions and documentation links ``` ``` **Finding:** 12 toggles with no visual sub-grouping headers or separators **WCAG:** 3.2.4 Consistent Navigation **Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** UX Design (primary) (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** 12 toggles in 3 columns with no visual hierarchy **Fix:** Add sub-section headers and visual separators within each column ``` ``` **Finding:** Required fields marked only by red asterisk with no aria-required **WCAG:** 3.3.2 Labels or Instructions **Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (primary) (secondary: Content Author) **Evidence:** `*` **Fix:** Add `aria-required="true"` to inputs and "Required" text near asterisk ``` ``` **Finding:** No unsaved-changes indicator in UI or on save button **WCAG:** 3.3.4 Status Messages **Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** UX Design (primary) (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** `const [saved, setSaved] = useState(true);` with no visual indicator **Fix:** Add "You have unsaved changes" banner and visual state on save button ``` ``` **Finding:** Technical jargon like "Enable HSTS preloading" appears with no tooltip or glossary link **WCAG:** 3.1.3 Unambiguous **Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Content Author (primary) (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** `{t.label}` without additional context **Fix:** Add tooltips with plain-language explanations for technical terms ``` ``` **Finding:** Red asterisk for required fields at 9px fails contrast and legibility **WCAG:** 1.4.3 Contrast Minimum **Perspective:** Environmental Contrast **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Visual Design (primary) (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** `.required-asterisk { color: #e53e3e; font-size: 9px }` **Fix:** Increase to 14px and ensure 3:1 contrast against background ``` ``` **Finding:** Error text at 11px may fail contrast depending on background **WCAG:** 1.4.3 Contrast Minimum **Perspective:** Environmental Contrast **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** Visual Design (primary) (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** `.error-inline { font-size: 11px; color: #e53e3e }` **Fix:** Verify 4.5:1 contrast ratio for error text ``` --- ## A11y Evidence Findings ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: magnification-reflow-001 fingerprint: 3a7d42f8-9c1e-4b2a-8c3d-1e2f3a4b5c6d source: perspective-audit Magnification Reflow checklist wcag_or_apg: 1.4.10 Reflow section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(j) severity: CRITICAL perspective_alarms: magnification_reflow=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM evidence: .settings-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr } reproduction_steps: Resize browser to 320px viewport expected_behavior: Content reflows to single column actual_behavior: 3-column layout with horizontal scroll trend: new ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: cognitive-neuro-002 fingerprint: 8b1c2d3e-4f5a-6b7c-8d9e-0f1a2b3c4d5e source: perspective-audit Cognitive Neurodivergent checklist wcag_or_apg: 3.3.3 Error Suggestion section_508_fpc_context: 1194.31(b) severity: MAJOR perspective_alarms: cognitive_neuro=HIGH, environmental_contrast=MEDIUM evidence: {t.error} reproduction_steps: View error state expected_behavior: Error message explains issue and suggests fix actual_behavior: Error code "ERR_CSP_001" with no explanation trend: new
